function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "suppress", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -1.0, "adjustment_reasons": ["Guard confirmed all clear via radio (E0 confirmed)", "Board load is 20/6 — critical flood conditions, protect operator attention", "6 questions already answered — sufficient investigation performed"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.1, "what_would_change_my_mind": "A second sensor corroborating the thermal anomaly, or a guard reporting actual signs of fire/heat while on patrol. Also, if board load drops below flood threshold before recheck, I'd revisit."}
